root.sql:
SELECT sc_cls_mon_mem_shr.membership_no , sc_cls_mon_mem_shr.member_name , sc_cls_mon_mem_shr.member_group_no , sc_cls_mon_mem_shr.member_status_code , sc_cls_mon_mem_shr.approve_date , sc_cls_mon_mem_shr.resign_date , sc_cls_mon_mem_shr.share_stock FROM sc_cls_mon_mem_shr ,sc_cls_mon_mem WHERE 1=1 AND sc_cls_mon_mem_shr.monthly_date = sc_cls_mon_mem.monthly_date AND resign_date between PKA_SRV_DATETIME.fp_FirstDayOfMonth( sc_cls_mon_mem.monthly_date ) and sc_cls_mon_mem.monthly_date /*WHERE*/ --and sc_cls_mon_mem.monthly_date = '31/8/2019'
order by sc_cls_mon_mem_shr.membership_no
